ransfer_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)
				   GROUP BY transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
				) AS drv_transfer_shipment ON (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										  AND (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_line_no = transfer_line.line_no)
		GROUP BY inv_loc.company_id
				,to_loc.company_id
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
				,inv_mast.item_id

	RETURN
END

id )  
				LEFT JOIN (		SELECT		oe_line_po.order_number,     
											oe_line_po.line_number,   
											SUM(oe_line_po.quantity_on_po) qty_transferred   
								FROM		oe_line_po    
								INNER JOIN	transfer_hdr on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = oe_line_po.po_no  
								WHERE		oe_line_po.delete_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.completed = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.cancel_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.connection_type = 'T'  
										AND COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'  
								GROUP BY	oe_line_po.order_number,   
											oe_line_po.line_number  
						)		AS			v_oe_line_po ON (v_oe_line_po.order_number = oe_line.order_no)  
														AND (v_oe_line_po.line_number = oe_line.line_no)  
				LEFT JOIN	system_setting ss ON (ss.name = 'incl_stk_bo_on_chold_in_rqmt')   
											AND (ss.configuration_id = 0)  
    
       
				WHERE		oe_line.disposition = 'T'  
					  AND	oe_line.delete_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_line.complete = 'N'   
					  AND	oe_line.source_loc_id = @al_SourceLocationID   
					  AND	oe_line.cancel_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.delete_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.completed = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.cancel_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.approved = 'Y'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.projected_order = 'N'  
					  AND	( NULL IS NULL OR oe_line.ship_loc_id = NULL )  
					  AND	( ( oe_hdr.validation_status <> 'Hold' ) OR ( ( inv_loc.stockable = 'Y' ) AND ( COALESCE(ss.value,'N') = 'Y' ) ) )  
					  AND	( oe_line.qty_ordered - oe_line.qty_allocated - oe_line.qty_on_pick_tickets - oe_line.qty_invoiced - oe_line.qty_canceled - oe_line.qty_staged) - COALESCE(v_oe_line_po.qty_transferred, 0) > 0  
					  AND	( @al_InvMastUid IS NULL or inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = @al_InvMastUid)  
  
				---------  
				UNION ALL  
				---------  
  
				SELECT		inv_mast.inv_mast_uid,  
							prod_order_hdr.source_location_id location_id,    
							prod_order_line_component.source_loc

r_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line  WITH (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)
				   GROUP BY transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
				) AS drv_transfer_shipment ON (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										  AND (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_line_no = transfer_line.line_no)
		GROUP BY inv_loc.company_id
				,to_loc.company_id
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
				,inv_mast.item_id
				,to_loc.location_id

	RETURN
END


--$Author: Claudia.gonzalez $
--$Date: 5/03/21 1:49p $
--$Revision: 1 $
--$Log: /Server/CommerceCenter/Z_Polecat (20.2)/Functions/p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty_by_to_loc.sql $
-- 
-- 1     5/03/21 1:49p Claudia.gonzalez
-- DEV: BP
-- DBA: CEG
-- Scopus #1424506:Create new function (similar to
-- p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty) but will include

CREATE VIEW p21_view_scp_get_transfer_info
AS
SELECT  transfer_hdr.company_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.transfer_no
	   ,transfer_hdr.from_location_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.to_location_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.transfer_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.shipping_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.planned_recpt_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag
	   ,transfer_hdr.carrier_id
	   ,address.name AS carrier_name
	   ,transfer_hdr.shipping_route_uid
	   ,shipping_route.route_code
	   ,shipping_route.route_description
	   ,transfer_hdr.complete_flag
	   ,transfer_hdr.delete_flag
	   ,transfer_line.line_no
	   ,transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
	   ,inv_mast.item_id
	   ,inv_mast.item_desc
	   ,transfer_line.unit_of_measure
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_to_transfer / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_to_transfer
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_transferred / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_shipped
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_received / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_received
	   ,CAST((transfer_line.qty_to_transfer - transfer_line.qty_transferred) / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_remaining
	   ,item_revision.revision_level AS trans_revision_level
	   ,transfer_line.row_status AS row_status_flag
	   ,transfer_line.delete_flag AS line_delete_flag
	   ,transfer_line.date_created
	   ,transfer_line.date_last_modified
 FROM p21_view_transfer_hdr AS transfer_hdr
INNER JOIN p21_view_transfer_line AS transfer_line ON transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no
INNER JOIN (SELECT prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid
			  FROM p21_view_prod_order_line_component AS prod_order_line_component
			 WHERE prod_order_line_component.complete <> 'Y'
			   AND prod_order_line_component.other_charge = 'N'
			   AND prod_order

) 'carrier'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_desc, '') 'reason_cd_desc'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_id, 'NULL') 'restricted_class_id'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_description, '') 'restricted_class_description'
FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
				   AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_line.source_loc_id)
INNER JOIN oe_hdr_salesrep ON (oe_hdr_salesrep.order_number = oe_hdr.order_no)
				  AND (oe_hdr_salesrep.primary_salesrep = 'Y')
LEFT JOIN contacts AS contacts_buyer ON (supplier.buyer_id = contacts_buyer.i

CREATE VIEW p21_view_oe_line_anticipated_allocation_summary
AS
SELECT	anticipated_allocation.outbound_transaction_no		AS order_no
		,anticipated_allocation.outbound_line_no			AS line_no
		,anticipated_allocation.inbound_transaction_type_cd
		,anticipated_allocation.inbound_transaction_no
		,anticipated_allocation.inbound_line_no		
		,anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date
		,CASE 
			WHEN EXISTS (	SELECT *
							FROM anticipated_allocation AS open_requirement WITH (NOLOCK)
							WHERE open_requirement.outbound_transaction_type_cd = 706
							  AND open_requirement.outbound_transaction_no = anticipated_allocation.outbound_transaction_no
							  AND open_requirement.outbound_line_no = anticipated_allocation.outbound_line_no
							  AND open_requirement.inbound_transaction_type_cd = 3554
						) THEN
				'PARTIAL'
			WHEN EXISTS (	SELECT *
							FROM anticipated_allocation AS multi_trans WITH (NOLOCK)
							WHERE multi_trans.outbound_transaction_type_cd = 706
							  AND multi_trans.outbound_transaction_no = anticipated_allocation.outbound_transaction_no
							  AND multi_trans.outbound_line_no = anticipated_allocation.outbound_line_no
							  AND multi_trans.anticipated_allocation_uid <> anticipated_allocation.anticipated_allocation_uid
						) THEN
				'MULTI'
			WHEN COALESCE(anticipated_allocation.worst_case_tbo_date_used, 'N') = 'Y' THEN
				'WORST CASE TBO'
			ELSE
				'FULL'
		END	AS anticipated_allocation_status
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.transit_days, ship_to.t

0) 'carrier'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_desc, '') 'reason_cd_desc'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_id, 'NULL') 'restricted_class_id'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_description, '') 'restricted_class_description'
		,COALESCE(territory.territory_id,'') 'territory_id'
		,dbo.p21_fn_validate_email_address(territory.email_address) 'territory_email'
		,dbo.p21_fn_validate_email_address(territory_grp.email_address) 'territory_group_email'
FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
				   AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_lin

buyer_name'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'

FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
				   AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_line.source_loc_id)
INNER JOIN oe_hdr_salesrep ON (oe_hdr_salesrep.order_number = oe_hdr.order_no)
				  AND (oe_hdr_salesrep.primary_salesrep = 'Y')
LEFT JOIN contacts AS contacts_buyer ON (supplier.buyer_id = contacts_buyer.i

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_post_compute_anticipated_allocation_alerts
WITH EXECUTE AS SELF
AS
BEGIN

	SET NOCOUNT ON

	--A user can setup alerts for when the expected delivery date generated by the anticipated allocation process
	--falls after the promise date.  Because expected delivery date can change outside of the P21 app as a result 
	--of the nightly anticipated allocation process, we need a procedure to generate alerts after the proc runs.

	DECLARE @ExpDeliveryDateTokenUid INT
	DECLARE @AlertJobId		UNIQUEIDENTIFIER

	--check that a user has an alert setup for the expected delivery date before we bother doing any work
	SELECT @ExpDeliveryDateTokenUid = token_uid
	FROM token
	WHERE name = 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'

	DECLARE @ld_current_timestamp datetime
	
	SET @ld_current_timestamp = dbo.p21_fn_GetSystemDatetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,NULL,NULL)

	IF EXISTS(	SELECT * 
				FROM alert_implementation_query
				INNER JOIN alert_implementation ON alert_implementation.alert_implementation_uid = alert_implementation_query.alert_implementation_uid
				WHERE alert_implementation_query.column_id = @ExpDeliveryDateTokenUid 
				  AND alert_implementation.row_status_flag = 704
				  AND alert_implementation.activation_date <= @ld_current_timestamp
				  AND alert_implementation.expiration_date >= @ld_current_timestamp
			)
	BEGIN
		--Update the order line so the "new line" alert won't be fired.
		UPDATE oe_line
		SET date_last_modified = @ld_current_timestamp
		FROM oe_line

CREATE FUNCTION p21_fnt_get_open_inbound_transactions
(	@al_LocationId	INT
	,@al_InvMastUid	INT
)

RETURNS @InboundTransactions TABLE
(	transaction_type_cd INT
	,transaction_no		INT
	,line_no			INT
	,sub_line_no		INT
	,expected_date		DATETIME
	,worst_case_tbo_date_used	CHAR(1)
	,sku_qty_incoming	INT
)
AS
BEGIN

--Note: Although the anticipated allocaiton funtionality would be more efficient if this logic were placed directly within
--p21_compute_anticipated_allocation, these selects are likely to need bug fixes and tweaking in terms of how the transactions
--are retrieved. This process will only run on-demand for a single item if the user specifically choose to do so (where a little 
--bit of inefficiency with passing the data around shouldn't really noticed), and overnight for all items, where performance 
--shouldn't be too great a concern as long as it finishes in less than 8 hours! To that end, at least for a while, please 
--keep this a separate function for ease of maintainability.

--These values correspond to "LinkQuantity" constants in PB code (C.LinkQuantityPOCd, C.LinkQuantityTBOCd, etc.)
DECLARE @TransactionType_PurchaseOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ScheduledPO INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ProdOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_Transfer INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ProcessTransaction INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_TransferBackorder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_VesselReceipt INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_OpenRequirement INT


SET @TransactionType_PurchaseOrder  = 916
SET @TransactionType_ScheduledPO  = 3552
SET @TransactionType_ProdOrder  = 980
SET @TransactionType_Transfer  = 904
SET @TransactionType_ProcessTransaction  = 1229
SET @TransactionType_TransferBackorder  = 1230
SET @TransactionType_VesselReceipt  = 1674
SET @TransactionType_OpenRequirement  = 3554


DECLARE @SysSetting_UseProdOrderRequiredDates CHAR(1)
DECLARE @SysSetting_DefaultTransferDays INT

SELECT @SysSett

) 'carrier'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_desc, '') 'reason_cd_desc'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_id, 'NULL') 'restricted_class_id'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_description, '') 'restricted_class_description'
FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
LEFT JOIN oe_line_982 ON (oe_line_982.oe_line_uid = oe_line.oe_line_uid) 
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
				   AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_line.source_loc_id)
INNER JOIN oe_hdr_salesrep ON (oe_hdr_salesrep.order_number = oe_hdr.order_no)
				  AND (oe_hdr_salesrep.primary_salesrep = 'Y')
LE

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_compute_anticipated_allocation
(	@al_LocationId	INT
	,@al_InvMastUid	INT
	,@debug	INT = 0
)
AS
BEGIN

--Build a list of anticipated allocations between outbound transactions (qty needed) and inbound transations (qty incoming) for 
--transactions that are not already "hard" linked.

--Pass 0/null for either @al_InvMastUid or @al_locationId to compute for all items or all locations.

CREATE TABLE #ItemLocationList
(	row_num			INT IDENTITY
	,location_id	INT
	,inv_mast_uid	INT
)

CREATE TABLE #Outbound
(	row_num			INT IDENTITY
	,transaction_type_cd	INT
	,transaction_no			INT
	,line_no				INT
	,sub_line_no			INT
	,required_date		DATETIME
	,sku_qty_needed		DECIMAL(19,9)
	,sku_qty_filled		DECIMAL(19,9)
)

CREATE TABLE #Inbound
(	row_num			INT IDENTITY
	,transaction_type_cd	INT
	,transaction_no			INT
	,line_no				INT
	,sub_line_no			INT
	,expected_date		DATETIME
	,worst_case_tbo_date_used CHAR(1)
	,sku_qty_incoming	DECIMAL(19,9)
	,sku_qty_used		DECIMAL(19,9)
)

DECLARE @CurrentInvMastUid	INT
DECLARE @CurrentLocationId	INT
DECLARE @CurrentItemRow		INT 
DECLARE @ItemRowCount		INT
DECLARE	@CurrentOutboundRow	INT
DECLARE	@OutboundRowCount	INT
DECLARE	@InboundRow			INT
DECLARE @CurrentOutboundIsTBO	CHAR(1)
DECLARE	@CurrentOutboundQtyRemaining	DECIMAL(19,9)
DECLARE	@CurrentInboundQtyAvailable		DECIMAL(19,9)

SET @CurrentItemRow = 1

DECLARE @TransactionType_SalesOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_Transfer INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_Transfe

) 'carrier'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_desc, '') 'reason_cd_desc'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_id, 'NULL') 'restricted_class_id'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_description, '') 'restricted_class_description'
FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
		AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_line.source_loc_id)
INNER JOIN oe_hdr_salesrep ON (oe_hdr_salesrep.order_number = oe_hdr.order_no)
		AND (oe_hdr_salesrep.primary_salesrep = 'Y')
LEFT JOIN contacts AS contacts_buyer ON (supplier.buyer_id = contacts_buyer.id)
		AND

CREATE FUNCTION p21_fnt_get_open_outbound_transactions
(	@al_LocationId	INT
	,@al_InvMastUid	INT
)

RETURNS @OutboundTransactions TABLE
(	transaction_type_cd INT
	,transaction_no		INT
	,line_no			INT
	,sub_line_no		INT
	,required_date		DATETIME
	,sort_priority		INT
	,sku_qty_needed		DECIMAL(19,9)
)
AS
BEGIN

--Note: Although the anticipated allocaiton funtionality would be more efficient if this logic were placed directly within
--p21_compute_anticipated_allocation, these selects are likely to need bug fixes and tweaking in terms of how the transactions
--are retrieved. This process will only run on-demand for a single item if the user specifically choose to do so (where a little 
--bit of inefficiency with passing the data around shouldn't really noticed), and overnight for all items, where performance 
--shouldn't be too great a concern as long as it finishes in less than 8 hours! To that end, at least for a while, please 
--keep this a separate function for ease of maintainability.


--These matches the sort order defined in d_inventory_allocation_line
DECLARE @SortPriority_TransferBackorder INT
DECLARE @SortPriority_SalesOrderTransfer INT
DECLARE @SortPriority_ProdOrderTransfer INT
DECLARE @SortPriority_SalesOrder INT 
DECLARE @SortPriority_ScheduledOrder INT
DECLARE @SortPriority_ProdOrder INT
DECLARE @SortPriority_ProcessTransaction INT


SET  @SortPriority_TransferBackorder  = 1
SET  @SortPriority_SalesOrderTransfer  = 2
SET  @SortPriority_ProdOrderTransfer  = 3
SET  @SortPriority_SalesOrder  = 4
SET  @SortPriority_ScheduledOrder  = 5
SET  @SortPriority_ProdOrder  = 6
SET  @SortPriority_ProcessTransaction  = 7


--These values don't really identify the transaction type, so much as the link type
--i.e. we have a different type for scheduled order lines even though the transaction is really still a sales order
--These values correspond to "LinkQuantity" constants in PB code (C.Link

r_purchasing_info.lead_time_safety_factor, 1)) + COALESCE(p21_view_supplier_purchasing_info.review_cycle, 0)), prod_order_line_component.expedite_date)
		ELSE NULL
	 END AS allocation_date
	,p21_view_prod_order_line_comp_anticipated_alloc_summary.inbound_transaction_type_cd
	,p21_view_prod_order_line_comp_anticipated_alloc_summary.inbound_transaction_no
	,p21_view_prod_order_line_comp_anticipated_alloc_summary.expected_inbound_date
	,p21_view_prod_order_line_comp_anticipated_alloc_summary.anticipated_allocation_status
FROM prod_order_line_component WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN prod_order_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON prod_order_hdr.prod_order_number = prod_order_line_component.prod_order_number
INNER JOIN prod_order_line WITH (NOLOCK) ON prod_order_line.prod_order_number = prod_order_line_component.prod_order_number
								   AND prod_order_line.line_number = prod_order_line_component.line_number
INNER JOIN inv_mast WITH (NOLOCK) ON inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid
INNER JOIN inv_mast AS assembly_inv_mast WITH (NOLOCK) ON assembly_inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = prod_order_line.inv_mast_uid
INNER JOIN address AS address_supplier WITH (NOLOCK) ON address_supplier.id = prod_order_line_component.supplier_id
INNER JOIN location WITH (NOLOCK) ON location.location_id = prod_order_line_component.source_location_id
INNER JOIN inv_loc WITH (NOLOCK) ON inv_loc.location_id = prod_order_line_component.source_location_id
						   AND inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid
INNER JOIN system_setting AS drv_SysLeadTime WITH (NOLOCK) ON drv_SysLeadTime.name = 'factor_lead_time_expedite_date'
LEFT JOIN prod_ord_line_po ON prod_ord_line_po.prod_order_number = prod_order_line_component.prod_order_number
						  AND prod_ord_line_po.line_number = prod_order_line_component.line_number
						  AND prod_ord_line_po.component_number = prod_order_line_component.component_number
						  AND prod_ord_line_po.connection_type = 'P'
						  A

) 'carrier'
		,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') 'revision'
		,COALESCE(contacts.direct_phone, '') 'contacts_direct_phone'
		,COALESCE(dbo.p21_fn_DatePart(oe_hdr.promise_date), '') 'header_promise_date'
		,COALESCE(sales_market_group.sales_market_group_id, '') 'sales_market_group_id'
		,COALESCE(oe_hdr.cancel_flag, '') 'cancel_flag'
		,COALESCE(users_taker.id, '') 'task_taker'
		-- 12.17 KMC 03/17/2016 - Feature 60789  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_delivery_date), 0) 'exp_delivery_date_days_after_prom_date'  
		,COALESCE(DATEDIFF(d, oe_line_promise_date.promise_date, anticipated_allocation.expected_inbound_date), 0) 'exp_in_stock_date_days_after_prom_date'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_id, '') 'reason_cd'
		,COALESCE(lost_sales.lost_sales_desc, '') 'reason_cd_desc'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_id, 'NULL') 'restricted_class_id'
		,COALESCE(restricted_class.class_description, '') 'restricted_class_description'
FROM	pending_alerts
INNER JOIN oe_hdr ON (pending_alerts.trans_no_varchar = oe_hdr.order_no)
INNER JOIN oe_line ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no)
--12.14 YCHEN 12/16/13 - Feature 56120: Exclude subtotal item (product_type = 'B') show up on OE alert notification.
--INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = oe_line.inv_mast_uid)
				   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'B') 
INNER JOIN customer ON (customer.customer_id = oe_hdr.customer_id)
				   AND (customer.company_id = oe_hdr.company_id)
INNER JOIN supplier ON (oe_line.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id)
INNER JOIN inv_loc ON (inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)
	AND (inv_loc.location_id = oe_line.source_loc_id)
INNER JOIN oe_hdr_salesrep ON (oe_hdr_salesrep.order_number = oe_hdr.order_no)
				  AND (oe_hdr_salesrep.primary_salesrep = 'Y')
LEFT JOIN contacts AS contacts_buyer ON (supplier.buyer_id = contacts_buyer.i

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_insert_anticipated_allocation_hard_links
(	@al_LocationId	INT
	,@al_InvMastUid	INT
)
AS BEGIN

DECLARE @TransactionType_SalesOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ProdOrderComponent INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ProcessTransaction INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_PurchaseOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_ProdOrder INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_Transfer INT
DECLARE @TransactionType_VesselReceipt INT


SET @TransactionType_SalesOrder  = 706
SET @TransactionType_ProdOrderComponent  = 1535
SET @TransactionType_ProcessTransaction  = 1229
SET @TransactionType_PurchaseOrder  = 916
SET @TransactionType_ProdOrder  = 980
SET @TransactionType_Transfer  = 904
SET @TransactionType_VesselReceipt  = 1674

DECLARE @SysSetting_UseProdOrderRequiredDates CHAR(1)

SELECT	@SysSetting_UseProdOrderRequiredDates = COALESCE(value, 'N')
FROM	system_setting 
WHERE	[name] = 'use_prodreqdate_on_commtsched'

--Order Lines linked to POs--
INSERT INTO anticipated_allocation 
			(location_id
			,inv_mast_uid
			,outbound_transaction_type_cd
			,outbound_transaction_no
			,outbound_line_no
			,inbound_transaction_type_cd
			,inbound_transaction_no
			,inbound_line_no
			,expected_inbound_date
			,sku_qty_to_be_allocated
			,hard_linked_flag)
SELECT	oe_line.source_loc_id
		,oe_line.inv_mast_uid
		,@TransactionType_SalesOrder
		,oe_line_po.order_number
		,oe_line_po.line_number
		,@TransactionType_PurchaseOrder
		,oe_line_po.po_no
		,oe_line_po.po_line_number
		--po_line.due_d
